metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for product design and project planning workflows

plugins.name: requirements-gatherer
plugins.description: Requirements gathering interview and issue creation workflow. A senior product consultant interviews users to produce structured requirements, then an organizer converts reviewed requirements into GitHub milestones/issues or Jira epics/stories.

plugins.name: visual-design
plugins.description: Visual design system toolkit with UX/usability expert review. Consultant skill for establishing design systems via interview or site extraction with page discovery, parallel fingerprinting, fluid responsive detection, and custom component motion discovery. Component-context skill with fuzzy matching for on-demand spec delivery. Design-reviewer skill and agent for live visual quality gate testing via Chrome browser inspection — now includes Category F UX and Usability Review (visual hierarchy, information architecture, navigation, cognitive load, cross-breakpoint consistency, interaction feedback, content readability at desktop and mobile). Fully report-only with categorized fix suggestions. Uses opus agent with haiku sub-agent for cost-efficient mechanical inspection dispatch. Update-component-index skill for regenerating the component compendium index.

plugins.name: functional-tester
plugins.description: Playwright functional test generator with full-stack performance analysis. Writes end-to-end tests via a TDD-style fix loop, then audits pages with Lighthouse CI and axe CLI for accessibility, performance, and SEO. Includes tech-stack-aware performance deep-dive: network waterfall analysis, API trace-back to backend code, and database query analysis. Lighthouse/axe/performance sections are report-only with categorized fix suggestions (code-level and directive-level). Uses opus agent with haiku sub-agent for cost-efficient TDD loop dispatch. Auto-installs Playwright, Lighthouse, and axe CLI if missing.

plugins.name: defect-gatherer
plugins.description: Defect reporting and submission workflow. Reporter skill conducts structured interviews, auto-generates reproduction steps via Chrome inspection (visual bugs) or code tracing (API bugs), cross-references requirements, and classifies as true defect, story update, or feature request. Organizer skill submits to GitHub, Jira, Linear, or GitLab with system-native formatting and requirement traceability.
